news.summary: In Sacramento, California on April 14, 2025, it was reported that Blue Diamond Growers, the leading almond processor and marketer, released a statement endorsing the recent announcement made by USDA Secretary Rollins regarding the launch of the new initiative called Advancing Markets for Producers (AMP). The company expressed its support for this initiative, highlighting their commitment to aiding producers in accessing new markets.
news.headline: Blue Diamond Growers supports USDA's AMP initiative to boost farmer resiliency. Largest almond processor.

news.summary: Tether, the issuer of USDT, has announced its plans to allocate its current and future computing power to the well-known Bitcoin mining pool, Ocean.
news.headline: Tether backs Bitcoin mining pool Ocean, deploying current and future hashrate to support -USDT issuer commits to support.

news.summary: A global pop culture lifestyle brand, Funko, Inc. (NASDAQ: FNKO), revealed plans to open its first Southeast Asian store in the Philippines with local retailer, Funtastik Enterprises Corp. The store is set to debut in June 2025, marking a significant step in Funko's international expansion strategy. This move underscores Funko's dedication to engaging with fans in their regions and enhancing the brand experience.
news.headline: Funko to open first licensed store in Southeast Asia in the Philippines by June 2025; expanding international growth.

news.summary: In Okotoks, Alberta, on April 14, 2025, Mullen Group Ltd. (TSX: MTL) shared its excitement about finalizing a significant deal. The corporation revealed that it has signed a definitive agreement to purchase the shares of Cole Group Inc., Cole International Inc., Abco International Freight Inc., and associated entities, known as the "Cole Group." The acquisition is contingent upon regulatory approvals, with both parties having submitted the required documents and anticipating the closure of the transaction in the second quarter of the year.
news.headline: Mullen Group Ltd. to acquire Cole Group Inc. including Cole International Inc. and Abco International Freight Inc. pending regulatory approval. Transaction expected to close in the second quarter.

news.summary: Vinci Partners Investments Ltd., with the ticker VINP on NASDAQ, based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, declared on April 14, 2025, that they are the controlling entity of a top-tier alternative investments and global solutions firm in Latin America.
news.headline: Vinci Compass to release Q1 2025 results on May 12; key info to be shared in Rio de Janeiro.

news.summary: Following a label expansion, UPLIZNA has entered a new rare disease market, yielding fruitful results for Amgen after its acquisition of Horizon Therapeutics for USD 27.8 billion. This drug is now the inaugural FDA-approved treatment for a specific condition.
news.headline: FDA approves Amgen's UPLIZNA for IgG4-related Disease, tapping USD 27.8B rare disease market opportunity.

news.summary: BioSyent Inc., a Canadian company listed on the TSX Venture exchange under the symbol RX, is set to participate in the Planet MicroCap Showcase: VEGAS 2025 investor conference at the Paris Hotel & Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada. The event will take place from April 22 to April 24, 2025. Mr. René Goehrum, the President and CEO of BioSyent, will be delivering a live presentation on April 23rd from 12:30pm to 1:00pm PDT in Track 2 – Bordeaux. This provides attendees with the opportunity to learn more about the company and its operations firsthand.
news.headline: BioSyent attends investor conference in Vegas on April 23, 2025. CEO to present at 12:30 pm PDT in Track 2.

news.summary: In the latest update on the economy, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This improvement in the job market has led to a rise in consumer spending, with retail sales increasing by 6.5% compared to last year. Additionally, the stock market has seen significant growth, with the main index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Analysts are optimistic about the future economic outlook, predicting further growth in the upcoming months.
news.headline: Lawsuit filed by Carbon Streaming against ex-executives and consultants for unspecified damages.

news.summary: Carl Black Orlando in Orlando, Florida, announced on April 14, 2025, that they are offering a low APR for drivers seeking to purchase a new full-size SUV. This limited-time finance offer aims to make vehicle ownership more accessible. Qualified buyers have the opportunity to secure this financing option.
news.headline: Carl Black Orlando is offering 0% APR on select 2024 Chevy models, making ownership more accessible for drivers in Orlando.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Georgia-Pacific revealed that Keith Hamilton, previously the vice president of operations for Corrugated, has been appointed as the president of the Corrugated division. With oversight of operations and commercial teams spanning 35 locations, Hamilton steps into this new role to lead the business forward.
news.headline: Keith Hamilton, VP of Operations, Corrugated, named president of Georgia-Pacific's Corrugated business overseeing 35 sites.

news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware, on April 14, 2025, Bannix Acquisition Corp. disclosed that their board of directors approved an extension for the initial business combination deadline. The new deadline date, which was previously set for April 14, 2025, has been moved to May 14, 2025. This extension gives Bannix an extra month to finalize the business combination.
news.headline: Bannix Acquisition Corp. extends deadline to finalize initial business combination to May 14, 2025.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Gates Industrial Corporation plc (NYSE: GTES) revealed a shift in the schedule for its first-quarter 2025 webcast and conference call. The event, originally set for 10 a.m. Eastern time, will now take place at 9 a.m. Eastern time on Wednesday, April 30, 2025. Further details regarding access to the webcast and conference call were also provided.
news.headline: Gates Industrial changes Q1 2025 conference call time from 10 a.m. to 9 a.m. on April 30, 2025.

news.summary: The trade wars initiated by President Trump's plan to impose tariffs on US imports have caused concerns in the cryptocurrency markets. Truebit executives believe that blockchain technology can help ensure fair application of tariffs by proving provenance and chain of custody for products. Trump's proposed tariffs would impact $2.4 trillion worth of imports, with the possibility of other countries implementing retaliatory measures. Truebit, a blockchain network, is in talks with software vendors and exploring its potential role in global supply chains. However, there are risks to blockchain networks due to tariffs, including disruptions to physical infrastructure and regulatory obstacles. Truebit's native token has a market capitalization of $20 million. Other crypto executives caution that trade wars could pose challenges to blockchain networks' integrity and user accessibility.
news.headline: Trade wars may drive governments towards Web3 adoption, says Truebit execs. Trump's proposed tariffs could impact $2.4 trillion in imports. Blockchain tech can ensure fair application of tariffs, improving supply chain transparency. Truebit's TRU token struggles post-launch in 2021. Several execs warn of risks to blockchain networks amid escalating trade tensions.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Osisko Development Corp. shared that its common share purchase warrants from private placements in late 2024 will now be tradeable on the TSX Venture Exchange under "ODV.WT.V." These warrants, issued between October and November, will begin trading on April 17, 2025. Osisko Development Corp. (NYSE: ODV, TSXV: ODV) expressed enthusiasm regarding this development.
news.headline: Osisko Development's warrants to be listed on TSXV under symbol "ODV.WT.V" from April 17, 2025.

news.summary: Woolpert has been chosen by the U.S. Geological Survey to analyze and outline elevation-derived hydrography data for Tennessee. This information, crucial for flood-risk management and infrastructure planning, will aid the state in making informed decisions. This development was announced on April 10, 2025, in Nashville.
news.headline: USGS partners with Woolpert for elevation-derived hydrography data for Tennessee, aiding flood risk management.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Property Meld, a top property maintenance operations platform, announced that Seek Now, a prominent inspection and data capture provider, has joined its Vendor Nexus Program. This collaboration is set to enhance property maintenance operations by leveraging Seek Now's expertise in inspection and data capture services. This partnership could potentially lead to improved efficiency and effectiveness in property maintenance processes.
news.headline: Property Meld partners with Seek Now to enhance property maintenance operations. Seek Now joins Vendor Nexus Program.

news.summary: iCreditWorks secures a significant $60 million funding round, spearheaded by Comvest Partners and Barings with additional investment from RedBird Capital, to support the growth of its all-encompassing PaaS platform. The company is dedicated to revolutionizing Point-Of-Sale (POS) financing. This funding round was announced in Iselin, N.J. on April 14, 2025.
news.headline: iCreditWorks secures $60M funding for growth and sector expansion with Comvest Partners, Barings, and RedBird Capital.

news.summary: New data reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 5.4%, the lowest it has been in over a year. The economy added 943,000 jobs in the last month, surpassing expectations and signaling a strong recovery from the impact of the pandemic. This surge in employment was largely driven by hiring in the leisure and hospitality, education, and healthcare sectors. The positive trend suggests that the labor market is steadily improving as businesses continue to reopen and expand operations. Additionally, wages have also seen an increase of 4.5% over the past year, providing further optimism for economic growth and stability in the near future.
news.headline: First-mover benefits present in trade discussions with White House, according to Bessent. #news #trade

news.summary: A recent survey conducted among 1,500 adults revealed that 72% of the respondents believe climate change is a major threat to the planet. The study also found that 65% of those surveyed support the implementation of stricter environmental regulations to address this issue. Additionally, 80% of participants agreed that individuals should make changes in their daily lives to help combat climate change. These results indicate a strong consensus among the population regarding the urgency of taking action to protect the environment.
news.headline: Bessent mentions Treasury's extensive arsenal for bond market support.

news.summary: Award-winning actor Eric Stonestreet, recognized for his role in a popular TV series, recently served as the godfather for the newest Norwegian Cruise Line ship, the Norwegian Aqua, at a ceremony held at PortMiami. The event showcased the cruise line's commitment to enhancing the guest experience by introducing additional relaxation options, more family-friendly activities, and improved vacation opportunities on Great Stirrup Cay. This move signifies NCL's focus on expanding its offerings to cater to a diverse range of travelers.
news.headline: Norwegian Cruise christens Norwegian Aqua in Miami & plans expansion for Great Stirrup Cay. Actor Eric Stonestreet as godfather. More relaxation, family activities, vacation ways unveiled.

news.summary: The maturity date of the facility has been extended to April 2030, and the pricing has been reduced. This decision reflects a long-term commitment, with the pricing modifications aimed at making the facility more competitive in the market. The extension to 2030 provides a significant period for the arrangement to remain in effect, ensuring stability and flexibility for involved parties. This move is strategic, as it aligns with current market trends and offers enhanced financial benefits.
news.headline: Oaktree Specialty Lending Corp extends secured credit facility to April 2030 and reduces pricing.

news.summary: South Bow Corp, a company listed on both TSX and NYSE under the ticker symbol SOBO, based in Calgary, Alberta, has announced that they will be disclosing their financial and operational performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 15, 2025, after the markets close. This update is eagerly anticipated by investors and analysts alike to gauge the company's growth and success during this period. Stay tuned for the specific numbers and details once the report is officially released.
news.headline: South Bow Corp. will release Q1 2025 results on May 15, 2025 (TSX & NYSE: SOBO), via press release.

news.summary: A recent study found that the average income for households in the United States increased by 6.8% to $68,700 in 2020. Additionally, the poverty rate decreased by 1.0% to 9.1%, marking the first decline since 2019. The study also revealed that the number of Americans without health insurance decreased by 1 million to a total of 28.2 million people. These statistics reflect the economic changes and challenges faced by Americans during the pandemic year.
news.headline: HNI Corporation reports Q1 results in conference call for fiscal year 2025.

news.summary: Avarga Limited, through its subsidiary Avarga Canada Limited, has agreed to purchase 2,397,200 common shares of Taiga Building Products Ltd. for a total of CDN$10,068,240. This acquisition will increase Avarga's ownership of Taiga to approximately 74.2% of the total issued and outstanding common shares. Prior to this deal, Avarga already owned 77,708,814 common shares, representing 72% of the total. The transaction is structured as a private agreement exemption under National Instrument 62-104. Avarga states that the acquisition is for investment purposes, and they may further adjust their ownership in the future.
news.headline: Avarga Limited to acquire 2,397,200 shares of Taiga Building Products for CDN$10,068,240, increasing ownership to 74.2%.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Cue Biopharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: CUE), based in Boston, disclosed plans to start an underwritten public offering of shares of its common stock (or pre-funded warrants for common stock) along with warrants to buy common stock. The company is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm focusing on creating innovative therapeutic biologics to target and regulate disease-specific T cells to combat cancer and autoimmune disorders. This offering hinges on market conditions, with no guarantee of completion or specifics regarding size or terms. All securities in the offering come from Cue Biopharma.
news.headline: Cue Biopharma (Nasdaq: CUE) plans public offering of common stock and warrants for market conditions, no set size/terms.

news.summary: Tech company Western Digital Corp (Nasdaq: WDC) is scheduled to release its Q3 fiscal year 2025 financial results before market hours on April 30, 2025. They will conduct a conference call with investors on the same day at 5:30 a.m. PT / 8:30 a.m. ET. Interested parties can access a live audio webcast and a replay of the call on investor.wdc.com. Western Digital is known for its data storage solutions.
news.headline: Western Digital (Nasdaq: WDC) to announce Q3 FY2025 financial results on April 30, 2025, with conference call at 5:30am Pacific/8:30am Eastern.

news.summary: In Long Beach, California, Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (Nasdaq: RKLB) revealed that it has secured a crucial role by being chosen to supply hypersonic test launch services. This includes utilizing its HASTE launch vehicle and engineering proficiency for two significant government development initiatives in the United States and the United Kingdom with a combined value in the billions. The U.S. Air Force is among the entities selecting Rocket Lab for this important task.
news.headline: Rocket Lab secures multi-billion dollar defense contracts for hypersonic tech with HASTE, boosting U.S. and UK programs.

news.summary: Dublin-based Allegion plc, a prominent global provider of security products and solutions, is set to announce its 2025 first-quarter financial results on April 24. The release will be made before the market opens, followed by a conference call featuring John H. Stone (President and CEO) and Mike Wagnes (Senior Vice President and CFO) at 8 a.m. ET on the same day. The call aims to discuss the company's performance with analysts and investors. A real-time webcast of the conference will be available for viewing.
news.headline: Allegion to announce Q1 2025 financial results on April 24 before market open. Conference call at 8 am ET. Webcast available.

news.summary: ATS Corporation, listed on both TSX and NYSE under the ticker symbol ATS, revealed that Ryan McLeod, the Chief Financial Officer, is set to take part in the RBC Capital Markets Canadian Industrials Conference scheduled for May 15, 2025, in Toronto. During the conference, management will be available for meetings with institutional investors. Those interested can organize these meetings by reaching out to their RBC Capital Markets contact or sending an email to dgalison@atsautomation.com. ATS Corporation is a prominent player in the industry, specializing in various sectors.
news.headline: ATS Corporation (TSX and NYSE: ATS) will attend RBC Capital Markets Canadian Industrials Conference in Toronto on May 15, 2025.
Get ready for the release of Lithium Argentina's Q1 2025 results on May 14 with important info.

news.summary: During the administration of President Trump, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission is seen to be easing its stand against cryptocurrency companies, after having clashed with several in the past. The number of firms that were previously under scrutiny by the SEC is steadily increasing.
news.headline: SEC under Trump drops crypto lawsuits and probes, backing off from conflicts with firms; list of former targets expanding.

news.summary: Par Pacific Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PARR) has revealed that it is set to unveil its first quarter 2025 financial results after the close of the New York Stock Exchange on May 6, 2025. An accompanying investor conference call is scheduled for May 7, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Central Time (10:00 a.m. Eastern). Interested parties can access the full release on Par Pacific’s website at http://www.parpacific.com.
news.headline: Par Pacific to release Q1 2025 results on May 6 after NYSE closes, with conference call on May 7 at 9am Central Time.

news.summary: In Carlsbad, California on April 14, 2025, Aurora Spine Corporation revealed that James Snow has resigned from the company's Board of Directors to become the Regulatory Affairs and Quality Assurance Manager. Snow, who has been a board member since Aurora Spine's establishment in 2012, will leverage his 20+ years of expertise in medical devices to guarantee the company's compliance with all regulatory standards. As a designer and producer of cutting-edge medical devices that enhance spinal surgery outcomes, Aurora Spine is listed on the TSXV as ASG and on the OTCQB as ASAPF.
news.headline: James Snow resigns from Aurora Spine Board to become Regulatory Affairs & QA Manager, leveraging 20+ years experience.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Cue Biopharma, Inc. revealed plans to hold a conference call and webcast the next day at 4:30 p.m. ET to share a business update. This clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, listed as CUE on Nasdaq, specializes in developing unique therapeutic biologics to target and regulate disease-specific T cells aimed at combating cancer and autoimmune illnesses. The upcoming update comes as part of their ongoing efforts in advancing research and development in this field.
news.headline: Cue Biopharma (Nasdaq: CUE) will host a business update call/webcast on April 15, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET.

news.summary: In recent news, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in the global COVID-19 cases, with over 10 million confirmed infections and more than 500,000 deaths worldwide. The United States continues to be the most affected country, with over 2.5 million confirmed cases and a death toll exceeding 125,000. The situation remains critical in countries like Brazil, Russia, and India, where the number of cases is rapidly rising. Health officials are urging the public to follow safety guidelines to prevent further spread of the virus.
news.headline: ON Semiconductor cancels $6.9B bid for Allegro, per source.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, the Taiwan Tourism Administration (TTA) unveiled its new tourism brand, "Taiwan – Waves of Wonder," at Seatrade Cruise Global, a prominent event in the cruise industry. With a focus on "Share, Discover, Engage, Enjoy," the launch aims to showcase Taiwan's attractions to a global audience.
news.headline: Taiwan Tourism Administration presents "Taiwan - Waves of Wonder" brand at Seatrade Cruise Global for the first time. #MIAMI #SeatradeCruiseGlobal #TaiwanTourismAdministration

news.summary: Boehringer Ingelheim, based in Ingelheim, Germany, and Cue Biopharma, Inc. in Boston, have revealed a significant partnership on April 14, 2025. This collaboration involves the development and market release of Cue Biopharma's CUE-501 product candidate, designed as a unique B cell depletion therapy targeting autoimmune diseases. Under the agreement, Cue Biopharma, a company in its clinical stage, specializing in innovative therapeutic biologics for precise modulation of disease-specific T cells, will work closely with Boehringer Ingelheim. The aim is to advance treatment possibilities for autoimmune and inflammatory disorders. The announcement comes with Cue Biopharma being listed on Nasdaq under the symbol CUE.
news.headline: Boehringer Ingelheim partners with Cue Biopharma to develop CUE-501 for autoimmune diseases. Strategic collaboration announced for new therapy.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, DeFi Technologies Inc., known as "DeFi Technologies" and traded as CBOE CA: DEFI, GR: R9B, and OTC: DEFTF, is a finance technology firm dedicated to bridging traditional capital markets with the decentralized finance sector.
news.headline: DeFi Technologies refiles Q2 and Q3 2024 financial statements. Toronto, April 14, 2025. Trading codes: CBOE CA: DEFI, GR: R9B, OTC: DEFTF.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Primis Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: FRST) from McLean, Virginia, revealed that they had sent a Hearing Request to Nasdaq to challenge the delisting decision. This action followed the disclosure made on April 9, 2025, in a Form 8-K submission. The Company's appeal to Nasdaq came after they were notified of their delisting from the stock market. Specific details regarding the reasons for the delisting and the content of the appeal were not provided in the statement.
news.headline: Primis Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: FRST) receives a stay extension on Nasdaq's delisting, after submitting a hearing request.

news.summary: In Toronto on April 14, 2025, Golconda Gold Ltd. shared news of their recent achievements. The company reported producing 2,947 ounces of gold in the first quarter of 2025 at the Galaxy Gold Mine. This output marks a substantial growth of 32% from the previous quarter and a notable 96% surge from the same period last year. Golconda Gold is listed as "GG" on the TSX-V and "GGGOF" on the OTCQB.
news.headline: Golconda Gold Ltd. reports 2,947 ounces of gold production in Q1 2025, a 32% increase from Q4 2024 and 96% from Q1 2024.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Electra Battery Materials Corporation, listed on NASDAQ as ELBM and TSX-V as ELBM, completed the last portion of its oversubscribed non-brokered private placement issued on March 24, 2025. The offering garnered around US$3.5 million in total gross proceeds.
news.headline: Electra closes final tranche of private placement, raising approx $3.5 million in gross proceeds.

news.summary: In Vancouver, Canada on April 14, 2025, Defense Metals Corp. revealed plans to distribute 640,097 common shares (known as "Interest Shares") to selected holders of secured convertible notes. The company, listed on TSXV as DEFN, OTCQB as DFMTF, and FSE as 35D, is initiating this share issuance as part of its strategic financial maneuvers.
news.headline: Defense Metals Corp to issue 640,097 common shares as interest payment to holders of secured convertible notes.

news.summary: Meta, the parent company of Facebook, is set to defend its acquisitions of WhatsApp and Instagram in a significant antitrust trial against the FTC. The trial, known as Meta's Big FTC Antitrust Trial, has commenced with Meta arguing that the purchases were necessary for competing with platforms like TikTok. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Meta, Facebook parent, starts FTC antitrust trial defending WhatsApp, Instagram buys amid TikTok competition.

news.summary: South Korea's Financial Services Commission (FSC) has expanded its ban on digital asset firms by blocking 14 crypto exchanges from the Apple Store, including KuCoin and MEXC, due to alleged unregistered overseas operations. The move is part of efforts to combat money laundering and user protection. Additionally, Google Play had previously blocked access to 17 unregistered exchanges, including KuCoin and MEXC. Those in violation of registration face criminal punishments of up to five years in prison and fines of up to $35,200. As of March 31, South Korea had over 16 million crypto exchange users, representing over 30% of the population, with predictions suggesting the number could exceed 20 million by 2025. Furthermore, it was reported that over 20% of South Korean public officials hold cryptocurrencies collectively amounting to $9.8 million, including Bitcoin, Ether, XRP, and Dogecoin. The crackdown on unregistered exchanges reflects the challenges posed by the increasing popularity of cryptocurrencies in South Korea.
news.headline: South Korea blocks 14 crypto exchanges on Apple Store, expanding ban for operating without registration. FSC reports heavy penalties up to $35,200.

news.summary: Applied Digital Corp (NASDAQ: APLD) released its third-quarter financial results on Monday after the market closed. The company reported Q3 revenue of $52.9 million, falling short of the estimated $63.42 million as reported by Benzinga Pro. Despite this, Applied Digital surpassed expectations for earnings with an adjusted loss of eight cents per share, beating the projected 11 cents per share loss. Overall, total revenue saw a 22% increase compared to the previous year, largely due to the ongoing expansion efforts. For full details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Applied Digital Corp's Q3 earnings: Revenue at $52.9M (missed $63.42M est.), shares slide despite 22% YoY growth.

news.summary: Stewart Information Services Corporation (NYSE: STC) has revealed its plans to conduct a conference call to review the earnings for the first quarter of 2025, scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on Thursday, April 24, 2025. The earnings will be made public after the market closes on Wednesday, April 23. To participate, interested individuals can dial (800) 267-6316 (USA) or (203) 518-9783 (International) using the access code STCQ125. A replay of the conference call will be accessible after the event.
news.headline: Stewart Information Services Corp. to hold Q1 2025 earnings call on April 24 at 8:30 am ET. Call replay available.

news.summary: Claritev Corporation (NYSE: CTEV), previously known as MultiPlan, based in McLean, Va., was recently awarded the "Data Solution of the Year for Insurance" award for their Ceres® product. Ceres®, a data and decision science solution, was recognized in the Industry Applications Category of the 6th annual Data Breakthrough Awards. Claritev focuses on improving healthcare affordability, transparency, and fairness. This award highlights their dedication to innovation in the sector.
news.headline: Claritev's Ceres® named "Data Solution of the Year for Insurance" in 2025 Data Breakthrough Awards. ($CTEV NYSE)

news.summary: Avicanna Inc.'s shares (TSX: AVCN) surged 26% on the TSX exchange after releasing its full-year 2024 audited financial results. The cannabis-biotech firm had a successful year, with revenue reaching CA$25.5 million ($18.38 million), a 52% increase from 2023. Gross profits rose to CA$12.9 million, up 94% year-over-year, and gross margins improved from 40% to 51%. The company's adjusted EBITDA loss narrowed to CA$1.4 million, showing a 68% improvement. CEO Aras Azadian highlighted the financial success and advancements in commercial, R&D, and clinical programs, positioning Avicanna for growth, international expansion, and innovation. Full article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Avicanna Inc. saw a 26%+ trade-up after reporting CA$25.5 million revenue in 2024, a 52% YoY increase, and a gross profit of CA$12.9 million, up 94%.

news.summary: Five American small businesses have filed a federal lawsuit against President Donald Trump, accusing him of misusing trade taxes under the guise of a non-existent national emergency. The complaint was submitted to the U.S. Court of International Trade, arguing that Trump unlawfully invoked the International Emergency Economic Powers Act (IEEPA) for imposing global tariffs on imports without Congressional approval. The businesses involved are V.O.S. Selections Inc., Genova Pipe, MicroKits LLC, FishUSA Inc., and Terry Precision Cycling LLC. They import products not available or sourced domestically at higher costs, and claim the tariffs threaten their business models and margins.
news.headline: 5 small businesses sue Trump over tariffs abuse, no 'national emergency'. Plaintiffs include  V.O.S. Selections Inc., Genova Pipe, MicroKits LLC, FishUSA Inc., and Terry Precision Cycling LLC. Tariffs pose threat to their business models.

news.summary: IDEX Corp (NYSE:IEX) from Northbrook, Illinois, stated it will unveil its Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025, before the market opens. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for 8:00 a.m. (CT) on the same day, featuring CEO and President Eric Ashleman and CFO Abhi Khandelwal. Access to the event and earnings presentation will be via webcast in listen-only mode.
news.headline: IDEX Corporation (NYSE:IEX) to release Q1 2025 results on May 1. Earnings call at 8:00 a.m. (CT) with CEO and CFO. Webcast available.
